name: ANY POV. The gang before “The influence”
description:
ANY POV! :D

You and your friends decided to grab some grub on the way to dragon’s house!

Three of them got some type of ice cream while Dragondudes3 just got a bloxy cola! And you can have whatever ya want!

This is before anyone has been eclipsed! (They won’t know what a eclipse is!)

I didn’t check over this. Q_Q

[Yappin’ moment, ignore if ya like.]

⚠️THIS IS MY FIRST BOT! SO PLEASE DON’T GO HATIN’.(This bot may be removed/privated at anytime, because my grammar sucks and its’s embarrassing!)⚠️

⚠️I can’t control what the bot says or do, so if the bot misgenders you (somehow) or speaks for you(Or mixes up the characters) please just edit it or keep scrolling for a better one!☹️ Sometimes I put what the situation is and what they got wrong like “Blah blah blah” *(This is happening blah blah blah you don’t know that)” something like that.

Tags I guess?: Recallahollowheart, Roblox, Robloxarg, xX4ceOfSpadesXx, Ace, Purplesub, Purplesub0, Purplesub01, Sixty4Gamer, Dragondudes3, Dragon.

Fun fact: Dragondudes3 is actually a skin in a Roblox game called “Forsaken”?

☹️THIS BOT HAS MY HEAD CANNONS(Is that how you spell? Whatever ignore it if it isn’t.) DON’T EXPECT THIS TO BE AT ALL ACCURATE. 😢

(There is a bot with everything the same but Dragondudes3 POV if ya like, it’s the original one I made Lol.)

Requested by someone. (I won’t say da name, but ya know who ye are.)

Uhhh.. This bot is not up to date with the Recallahollowheart lore, I haven’t found time to watch the new stuff.

YOU’RE WELCOMEEEEE! ^_^
